supportedQuantFormats.description: INT8 quantized ONNX export (primary mid-range Android path)
INT4 / INT4-AWQ style quantized ONNX export (memory-constrained devices)

unsupported.reason: Exceeds typical mid-range peak-RSS budget for NFR-01 class devices
Not a mobile-sovereign quant; reject at model-card / load planner

notes: memoryFootprintMiB on the model card must reflect peak RSS, not bare weight file size. load() refuses when footprint exceeds the mid-range device ceiling.
